subject: June 14th, 2026
fact: The session takes place on June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is an unconscious Duergar found in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled into the darkness during the ambush.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos of the fight.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: The Zhentarim Black Network is the organization Thera Grabelthum was spying for.
source_quote: spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow found bound and tormented in the rogue Mind Flayer's lair.
source_quote: The party discovers Arrizz bound and tormented

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was cured of his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled with the party back to Sporedome.
source_quote: Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz expressed a pragmatic hope that he would never see the party again unless they were there to save him.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again, but if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought is the mad Mind Flayer the party came to destroy.
source_quote: Rogue Thought — the mad Mind Flayer they had come to destroy

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was sipping casually from a grisly brain jar when the party arrived.
source_quote: sipping casually from one of his grisly jars

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought identified Bramgrim as the greatest magical threat through mind-reading.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground before vanishing.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground, and vanished in a flash of planar magic

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed revenge alongside Graz'zt before escaping.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord referenced by Rogue Thought as seeking revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's madness was being held back by brain-capped mushrooms.
source_quote: holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's corruption was the target of the fire giants' work in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: unleash Graz'zt's corruption upon the surface world

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the powerful and influential criminal matriarch of Hillsfar.
source_quote: Isthana, the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner in Hillsfar.
source_quote: promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana gave Felkur three bottles of rare wine as a personal gift.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied that any business venture without her support would struggle in Hillsfar.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard leading the Drow resistance in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'.
source_quote: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief'

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was identified by Rogue Thought as the greatest magical threat.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians during the battle.
source_quote: summoning a storm of spectral guardians

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim healed the injured and unconscious Owlbear after the combat ended.
source_quote: Bramgrim heals the injured and unconscious Owlbear

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows during the battle.
source_quote: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Daein
fact: Daein led an assault against the Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Daein leads an assault against the Githyanki

subject: Daein
fact: Daein delivered a relentless series of blows that drove Rogue Thought to the edge of destruction.
source_quote: Daein surged forward and delivered a relentless series of blows

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned and helpless by the intellect devourer's psychic blast.
source_quote: left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer is described as a pulsating brain on legs.
source_quote: a pulsating brain on legs

subject: intellect devourer
fact: Felkur destroyed the intellect devourer with a firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur destroys the intellect devourer with a firebolt

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Four Githyanki warriors flanked Rogue Thought in the final chamber.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains a moss-covered chamber where Thera Grabelthum was found.
source_quote: uncovering a moss-covered chamber where they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The freezing chamber is kept cold by towering columns of ice.
source_quote: freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The freezing chamber contains a massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains.
source_quote: massive block of opaque ice preserving suspended brains

subject: freezing chamber
fact: Small vials of yellowish liquid were found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: freezing chamber
fact: Strange otherworldly symbols were visible in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: strange otherworldly symbols

subject: freezing chamber
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings was found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: freezing chamber
fact: A suspicious chest sat nearby in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a suspicious chest sat nearby

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The innermost sanctum walls are festooned with graven images of skulls and brains.
source_quote: walls festooned with graven images of skulls and brains

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The innermost sanctum is shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress.
source_quote: shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: Mind Flayer's innermost sanctum
fact: A large pile of cushions was located at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: large pile of cushions

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a fungal city where the party returned to report their success.
source_quote: made their way back through the Underdark to Sporedome

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is the surface city where the party returned and was invited to dinner.
source_quote: returned to Hillsfar

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is an Underdark city controlled by fire giants.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: Dalelands
fact: The Dalelands are a location on the surface that fire giants have turned their eyes toward.
source_quote: toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar itself

subject: brain-capped mushrooms
fact: The party secured brain-capped mushrooms to hold back Graz'zt's madness.
source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured

subject: opals
fact: The party found two opals while searching the area.
source_quote: finding two opals

subject: circlet
fact: The party found a valuable circlet while searching the area.
source_quote: a valuable circlet

subject: chainmail pouch
fact: The party found a chainmail pouch of gold coins while searching the area.
source_quote: chainmail pouch of gold coins

subject: copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings was found in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings

subject: suspicious chest
fact: The party chose to leave a suspicious chest alone in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: one the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: brains
fact: The party placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors.
source_quote: placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Rogue Thought sipped from one of the decorative brain jars.
source_quote: sipping casually from one of his grisly jars

subject: severed tentacles
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: rod of the pact keeper
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with a rod of the pact keeper.
source_quote: rewards the party with a rod of the pact keeper

subject: wand of the war mage
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with an upgraded wand of the war mage.
source_quote: an upgraded wand of the war mage

subject: rare wine
fact: Isthana presented Felkur with three bottles of rare wine.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: magical mushroom
fact: The party used a piece of magical mushroom to cure Arrizz's demonic madness.
source_quote: cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Mind Flayer promised to pass intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave sent a telepathic message to Akritas.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants are controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: Drow resistance
fact: The Drow resistance in Szith Morcane is led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: ambush
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: psychic blast
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned.
source_quote: unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: fireball
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior

subject: tentacle severing
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground.
source_quote: severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground

subject: planar escape
fact: Rogue Thought vanished in a flash of planar magic to escape to another dimension.
source_quote: vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: dinner invitation
fact: The party was invited to a private dinner by Isthana in Hillsfar.
source_quote: promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: telepathic message
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave warning of fire giants.
source_quote: telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Graz'zt's corruption
fact: The party is tasked with stopping the spread of Graz'zt's madness and corruption.
source_quote: stop the spread of Graz'zt's madness and drive out the fire giants

subject: business venture
fact: The party floated the idea of starting a business in Hillsfar.
source_quote: party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: revenge vow
fact: Rogue Thought vowed that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Brain Fridge
fact: The Brain Fridge is a freezing chamber kept at a cooler temperature by columns of ice.
source_quote: A freezing chamber within the lair kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice

fact: A large block of opaque ice in the Brain Fridge is used to preserve suspended brains.
source_quote: containing a large block of opaque ice used to preserve suspended brains

subject: small vials of yellowish liquid
fact: Small vials of yellowish liquid are found in the Brain Fridge.

fact: A hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols is located in the Brain Fridge.
source_quote: and a hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols

fact: Rogue Thought's Chamber is a large room decorated with graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes.

fact: The walls of Rogue Thought's Chamber feature graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes shimmering with Faerzress.

fact: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center of Rogue Thought's Chamber.

fact: A large pile of cushions is located in the center of Rogue Thought's Chamber.
source_quote: alongside a large pile of cushions

fact: Sporedome is a fungal city in the Underdark where the party reported their success to the Mind Flayer who hired them.
source_quote: A fungal city in the Underdark where the party reported their success to the Mind Flayer who hired them

fact: Hillsfar is a major surface city where the party met with Isthana to discuss starting a business.
source_quote: A major surface city where the party met with Isthana to discuss starting a business

fact: Szith Morcane is a location mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress.

fact: Fire giants currently control Szith Morcane and are nearing completion of their work.

fact: Arrizz is a drow previously encountered by the party who was found bound and tormented in the lair.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz suffers from demonic madness that was cured by a piece of magical mushroom.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer.
source_quote: he agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer

fact: Arrizz parted ways with the party at Sporedome with a wry farewell.
source_quote: then parted ways at Sporedome with a wry farewell

fact: Thera Grabelthum is a Duergar found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber.

fact: Thera Grabelthum initially claimed to be an innocent traveler.

fact: Under intimidation, Thera Grabelthum admitted to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled during the ambush.

fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos.

fact: Githyanki Warriors are arrogant and warlike warriors who used greatswords and teleportation to fight the party.

fact: Some Githyanki Warriors served as guards in the lair.

fact: Some Githyanki Warriors were found tormenting Arrizz.

fact: An Intellect Devourer is a horrifying, pulsating brain on legs that emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull.
source_quote: A horrifying, pulsating brain on legs that emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull

fact: The Intellect Devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.

fact: The Intellect Devourer was destroyed by the party.

fact: Rogue Thought is a mad Mind Flayer found in his inner sanctum sipping from decorative brain jars.

fact: Rogue Thought was served by Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: He was served by Githyanki warriors

fact: Rogue Thought appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt.
source_quote: appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt

fact: Rogue Thought communicated telepathically.

fact: When brought near death by the party, Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles.
source_quote: When brought near death by the party, he severed his own tentacles

fact: Rogue Thought plane shifted away, vowing revenge.
source_quote: and plane shifted away, vowing revenge

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's loyal sidekick who was stunned by the intellect devourer's psychic blast.

fact: The Owlbear was healed during a short rest.

fact: The Owlbear charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought.
source_quote: and then charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought

fact: Solom Ned'razak is a drow archmage referenced at the end of the session.
source_quote: A drow archmage referenced at the end of the session

fact: Solom Ned'razak declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra.
source_quote: who declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the powerful and influential head of the criminal element in Hillsfar.
source_quote: The powerful and influential head of the criminal element in Hillsfar

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner.
source_quote: who invited the party to a private dinner

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana offered patronage and protection for any business the party might start.
source_quote: She offered patronage and protection for any business they might start

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana made clear that ventures without her support would not fare well.
source_quote: making clear that ventures without her support would not fare well

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city.
source_quote: and sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow wizard mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message.

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has returned to his people and is ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane.
source_quote: as having returned to his people and being ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is ready to lead the resistance against the fire giants.
source_quote: to lead the resistance against the fire giants

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: A piece of Magical Mushroom was used by the party to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness.
source_quote: A piece of fungi used by the party to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness

subject: Opals
fact: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each, discovered among the treasures in the lair.
source_quote: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each, discovered among the treasures in the lair

subject: Circlet
fact: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces was discovered by the party while searching the lair.
source_quote: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces discovered by the party while searching the lair

subject: Chainmail Pouch
fact: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces was found among the loot in the lair.
source_quote: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces, found among the loot in the lair

subject: Copper Plate
fact: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side was found hidden within the icy chamber.
source_quote: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side, found hidden within the icy chamber

subject: Brains
fact: Biological specimens found preserved in ice and jars throughout the lair.
source_quote: Biological specimens found preserved in ice and jars throughout the lair

subject: Brain collection
fact: The party collected enough brains to place one at each of the magically sealed doors.
source_quote: The party collected enough of them to place one at each of the magically sealed doors

subject: Door unlocking
fact: Placing a brain at each of the magically sealed doors unlocked entry to the final chamber.
source_quote: unlocking entry to the final chamber

subject: Brain Jars
fact: Tall, decorative containers from which Rogue Thought was consuming his grisly meals when the party entered his chamber.
source_quote: Tall, decorative containers from which Rogue Thought was consuming his grisly meals when the party entered his chamber

subject: Mind Flayer Tentacles
fact: Mind Flayer Tentacles were severed from Rogue Thought before he escaped via plane shift.
source_quote: Severed from Rogue Thought before he escaped via plane shift

subject: Proof of victory
fact: The party presented the severed tentacles to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory over the rogue.
source_quote: The party presented these to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory over the rogue

subject: Wand of the War Mage +2
fact: A powerful magical wand gifted to Felkur by the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as a reward for defeating Rogue Thought.
source_quote: A powerful magical wand gifted to Felkur by the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as a reward for defeating Rogue Thought

subject: Wand upgrade
fact: The Wand of the War Mage +2 upgraded Felkur's previous wand of the war mage +1.
source_quote: upgrading his previous wand of the war mage +1

subject: Rare Wine
fact: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine were brought by Isthana as a gift to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine brought by Isthana as a gift to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar

subject: Goodwill fostering
fact: The Rare Wine was used to foster goodwill and open negotiations.
source_quote: used to foster goodwill and open negotiations

subject: Brain-capped Mushrooms
fact: Brain-capped Mushrooms are magical fungi referenced in the Emerald Enclave's message as having been secured by the party.
source_quote: Magical fungi referenced in the Emerald Enclave's message as having been secured by the party

subject: Madness defense
fact: The Brain-capped Mushrooms serve as a defense against the madness of Graz'zt.
source_quote: serving as a defense against the madness of Graz'zt

subject: Spirit Guardians casting
fact: Spirit Guardians was cast by Bramgrim multiple times throughout the session.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim multiple times throughout the session

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The spectral protectors surrounded Bramgrim and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy.
source_quote: The spectral protectors surrounded him and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians slowing
fact: Spirit Guardians slowed several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: also slowing several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws

subject: Firebolt casting
fact: Firebolt was used by Felkur to incinerate the intellect devourer and damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: Used by Felkur to incinerate the intellect devourer and damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoning
fact: Spiritual Weapon was summoned by Bramgrim to manifest a floating weapon that could strike at enemies he could not directly see.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim to manifest a floating weapon that could strike at enemies he could not directly see

subject: Spiritual Weapon attack
fact: The Spiritual Weapon attacked through walls of the lair.
source_quote: attacking through walls of the lair

subject: Misty Step usage
fact: Misty Step was used by multiple Githyanki warriors to instantly teleport across the battlefield.
source_quote: Used by multiple Githyanki warriors to instantly teleport across the battlefield

subject: Misty Step purpose
fact: Githyanki warriors used Misty Step primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians.
source_quote: primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians

subject: Fireball casting
fact: Fireball was unleashed by Felkur in the final chamber.
source_quote: Unleashed by Felkur in the final chamber

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The massive explosion of flame caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius, dealing heavy damage to most of them.
source_quote: the massive explosion of flame caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius, dealing heavy damage to most of them

subject: Hunter's Mark application
fact: Hunter's Mark was applied by Akritas to track her target and increase the lethality of her arrow strikes during combat.
source_quote: Applied by Akritas to track her target and increase the lethality of her arrow strikes during combat

subject: Plane Shift usage
fact: Rogue Thought used Plane Shift to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death.
source_quote: Used by Rogue Thought to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death

subject: Tentacle severing
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles to leave behind as a distraction before plane shifting.
source_quote: after first severing his own tentacles to leave behind as a distraction

subject: Toll the Dead casting
fact: Toll the Dead is a potent cantrip used by Bramgrim to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: A potent cantrip used by Bramgrim to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior

subject: Toll the Dead damage
fact: Toll the Dead dealt heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe.
source_quote: dealing heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe
